entry.title: Cartes sur table Biélorussie : ce que la crise politique pourrait bouleverser

link.title: Cartes sur table Biélorussie : ce que la crise politique pourrait bouleverser

entry.content:
Partout en Biélorussie, la population demande le départ d’Alexandre Loukachenko, au pouvoir depuis 1994. La révolte a éclaté le 9 août 2020, lorsque le chef d’État sortant a été donné vainqueur de l’élection présidentielle avec plus de 80% des voix. Une victoire refusée par son adversaire, l’opposante Svetlana Tikhanovskaïa, et critiquée par l’Union européenne, qui en conteste le caractère démocratique. Quels sont les enjeux de la crise sans précédent que traverse cette ex-République soviétique ? Pourquoi oppose-t-elle la Russie et l’Union européenne ? La Biélorussie risque-t-elle une guerre ouverte avec Moscou, comme ça a été le cas en Ukraine après la révolution de Maïdan en 2014 ? Décryptage en cartes animées.
Notre site :
Notre chaîne Youtube :
entry.summary: Partout en Biélorussie, la population demande le départ d’Alexandre Loukachenko, au pouvoir depuis 1994. La révolte a éclaté le 9 août 2020, lorsque le chef d’État sortant a été donné vainqueur de l’élection présidentielle avec plus de 80% des voix. Une victoire refusée par son adversaire, l’opposante Svetlana Tikhanovskaïa, et critiquée par l’Union européenne, qui en conteste le caractère démocratique. Quels sont les enjeux de la crise sans précédent que traverse cette ex-République soviétique ? Pourquoi oppose-t-elle la Russie et l’Union européenne ? La Biélorussie risque-t-elle une guerre ouverte avec Moscou, comme ça a été le cas en Ukraine après la révolution de Maïdan en 2014 ? Décryptage en cartes animées. Notre site : Notre chaîne Youtube :

entry.title: One dead and dozens are injured at a 3,000ft-long glass slide in China as tourists go down ‘too

link.title: One dead and dozens are injured at a 3,000ft-long glass slide in China as tourists go down ‘too

entry.content: Chinese state media has defended a party which saw thousands of people pack out a water park in Wuhan. Pictures showed Wuhan Maya Beach Water Park being jam-packed by mask-free revellers as they stood shoulder to shoulder in water on Saturday. Global Times, an English-language newspaper backed by the Chinese Communist Party, hit back at critics who saw the party as a slap in the face to the rest of the world. The paper championed Wuhan’s strict lockdown measures and the testing of its nearly 11 million residents, saying the massive pool party
entry.summary: Chinese state media has defended a party which saw thousands of people pack out a water park in Wuhan. Pictures showed Wuhan Maya Beach Water Park being jam-packed by mask-free revellers as they stood shoulder to shoulder in water on Saturday. Global Times, an English-language newspaper backed by the Chinese Communist Party, hit back at critics who saw the party as a slap in the face to the rest of the world. The paper championed Wuhan’s strict lockdown measures and the testing of its nearly 11 million residents, saying the massive pool party

entry.title: ตัวอย่าง โซ่เวรี EP.3 16 ส.ค.63 Ch7HD

link.title: ตัวอย่าง โซ่เวรี EP.3 16 ส.ค.63 Ch7HD

entry.content:
ตัวอย่าง โซ่เวรี EP.3 16 ส.ค.63
เพราะความผิดพลาดเพียงชั่วคืน กลับกลายเป็นตราบาปชั่วชีวิต "ความรัก" ที่เริ่มต้นโดยไม่รู้ตัว จึงกลายเป็น "ความแค้น" ที่ยากจะอภัย! ติดตามชม โซ่เวรี ได้ทุกวันศุกร์ เสาร์ อาทิตย์ เวลา 20.30 น.
ดูคลิปโซ่เวรี ย้อนหลังทั้งหมด ได้ที่ :
entry.summary: ตัวอย่าง โซ่เวรี EP.3 16 ส.ค.63 เพราะความผิดพลาดเพียงชั่วคืน กลับกลายเป็นตราบาปชั่วชีวิต "ความรัก" ที่เริ่มต้นโดยไม่รู้ตัว จึงกลายเป็น "ความแค้น" ที่ยากจะอภัย! ติดตามชม โซ่เวรี ได้ทุกวันศุกร์ เสาร์ อาทิตย์ เวลา 20.30 น. ดูคลิปโซ่เวรี ย้อนหลังทั้งหมด ได้ที่ :

entry.title: Championnat de France 2020 - Arnaud Démare : ‘C’est mon plus beau titre… !’

link.title: Championnat de France 2020 - Arnaud Démare : ‘C’est mon plus beau titre… !’

entry.content: Grand favori de cette course en ligne des Championnats de France, Arnaud Démare a totalement assumé ce statut ce dimanche à Grand-Champ. Soutenu par une équipe Groupama-FDJ impériale jusqu’à cinq kilomètres de l’arrivée, le Picard a ensuite pris les choses en main pour tenir le coup face aux attaques de Julian Alaphilippe (Deceuninck-Quick Step). Plus fort au sprint que Bryan Coquard (B&B Hotels-Vital Concept) et le cinquième du Tour de France 2019, Arnaud Démare décroche ainsi son troisième maillot tricolore après celui obtenu en 2014 et 2017.
entry.summary: Grand favori de cette course en ligne des Championnats de France, Arnaud Démare a totalement assumé ce statut ce dimanche à Grand-Champ. Soutenu par une équipe Groupama-FDJ impériale jusqu’à cinq kilomètres de l’arrivée, le Picard a ensuite pris les choses en main pour tenir le coup face aux attaques de Julian Alaphilippe (Deceuninck-Quick Step). Plus fort au sprint que Bryan Coquard (B&B Hotels-Vital Concept) et le cinquième du Tour de France 2019, Arnaud Démare décroche ainsi son troisième maillot tricolore après celui obtenu en 2014 et 2017.

entry.title: Johnson on recent slump: ‘Time is running out’ to win

link.title: Johnson on recent slump: ‘Time is running out’ to win

entry.content: Hendrick Motorsports driver Jimmie Johnson comments on the dwindling weeks of his full-time career in the NASCAR Cup Series and a winless drought as he heads to his best track, Dover.
entry.summary: Hendrick Motorsports driver Jimmie Johnson comments on the dwindling weeks of his full-time career in the NASCAR Cup Series and a winless drought as he heads to his best track, Dover.

entry.title: La Rolls-Royce Phantom V passe par la case Rétrofit

link.title: La Rolls-Royce Phantom V passe par la case Rétrofit

entry.content: Lunaz, spécialiste britannique du rétrofit, ajoute la Rolls-Royce Phantom V à son catalogue. Ce chef d’œuvre du XXe siècle a été totalement desossé puis restauré à l’état neuf pour se transformer en véhicule électrique avec plus de 480 km d’autonomie pour un prix de vente de 556.000 euros.
entry.summary: Lunaz, spécialiste britannique du rétrofit, ajoute la Rolls-Royce Phantom V à son catalogue. Ce chef d’œuvre du XXe siècle a été totalement desossé puis restauré à l’état neuf pour se transformer en véhicule électrique avec plus de 480 km d’autonomie pour un prix de vente de 556.000 euros.

entry.title: DPC Demokrat Dukung Fadia Arafiq - Riswadi

link.title: DPC Demokrat Dukung Fadia Arafiq - Riswadi

entry.content:
PEKALONGAN, KOMPAS.TV - Keputusan DPC Partai Demokrat Kabupaten Pekalongan mendukung pencalonan balon Bupati dan Wakil Bupati Fadia Arafiq dan Riswadi setelah seluruh pimpinan anak cabang menyetujui. Menurut ketua DPC Partai Demokrat Kabupaten Pekalongan Mashadi, Fadia Arafiq dan Riswadi, diyakini akan menang dalam kontestasi Pilkada serentak mendatang.
Karena Fadia merupakan ketua DPD Partai Golkar sementara Riswadi ketua DPC PDI Perjuangan. menurut Mashadi , kedua Partai ini memiliki simpatisan yang tidak diragukan lagi di Pekalongan.
Begitu juga dengan Partai Demokrat yang juga mempunyai basis massa yang siap memenangkan Fadia Arafiq dan Riwadi. Sementara Fadia Arafiq yang hadir dalam kesempatan itu mengungkapkan dengan bergabungnya Demokrat menjadi angin segar memenangkan Pilkada.
Fadia menambahkan hingga mulai banyak Partai yang mendekat ke pihaknya yang siap berjuang memenangkan Pilkada Desember 2020 mendatang.
entry.summary: PEKALONGAN, KOMPAS.TV - Keputusan DPC Partai Demokrat Kabupaten Pekalongan mendukung pencalonan balon Bupati dan Wakil Bupati Fadia Arafiq dan Riswadi setelah seluruh pimpinan anak cabang menyetujui. Menurut ketua DPC Partai Demokrat Kabupaten Pekalongan Mashadi, Fadia Arafiq dan Riswadi, diyakini akan menang dalam kontestasi Pilkada serentak mendatang. Karena Fadia merupakan ketua DPD Partai Golkar sementara Riswadi ketua DPC PDI Perjuangan. menurut Mashadi , kedua Partai ini memiliki simpatisan yang tidak diragukan lagi di Pekalongan. Begitu juga dengan Partai Demokrat yang juga mempunyai basis massa yang siap memenangkan Fadia Arafiq dan Riwadi. Sementara Fadia Arafiq yang hadir dalam kesempatan itu mengungkapkan dengan bergabungnya Demokrat menjadi angin segar memenangkan Pilkada. Fadia menambahkan hingga mulai banyak Partai yang mendekat ke pihaknya yang siap berjuang memenangkan Pilkada Desember 2020 mendatang.

entry.title: Woman Performs Funny Exorcism on Angry Dog

link.title: Woman Performs Funny Exorcism on Angry Dog

entry.content: This dog had anger issues. So, his owner decided to do a funny exorcism on him. She held him and started saying prayers, while he growled throughout, with an angry face. At the end, when the woman asked him if he was alright, he cooled down funnily.
entry.summary: This dog had anger issues. So, his owner decided to do a funny exorcism on him. She held him and started saying prayers, while he growled throughout, with an angry face. At the end, when the woman asked him if he was alright, he cooled down funnily.

entry.title: Supportive man shaves girlfriend’s head, then surprises her by doing his own

link.title: Supportive man shaves girlfriend’s head, then surprises her by doing his own

entry.content:
This supportive boyfriend shaved his girlfriend’s head, then surprised her by doing his own in an emotional act of solidarity in Monaco on May 7.
The TikTok shows Eva Barilaro, who has alopecia, in the mirror, visibly upset while her boyfriend, Damien, shaves her head.
Eva told Newsflare: "I was diagnosed with alopecia ten years ago, and have been bald ever since, alternating with wigs or scarves. Full of hope after months growing my hair for the first time in ten years, it started falling out again."
As soon as Damien finishes helping Eva shave her head, he takes the clippers to his own hair, before Eva breaks down crying.
Eva uploaded the timelapse clip to TikTok (@eva_barilaro), where it went viral, reaching 1.2 million views and an outpouring of support.
entry.summary: This supportive boyfriend shaved his girlfriend’s head, then surprised her by doing his own in an emotional act of solidarity in Monaco on May 7. The TikTok shows Eva Barilaro, who has alopecia, in the mirror, visibly upset while her boyfriend, Damien, shaves her head. Eva told Newsflare: "I was diagnosed with alopecia ten years ago, and have been bald ever since, alternating with wigs or scarves. Full of hope after months growing my hair for the first time in ten years, it started falling out again." As soon as Damien finishes helping Eva shave her head, he takes the clippers to his own hair, before Eva breaks down crying. Eva uploaded the timelapse clip to TikTok (@eva_barilaro), where it went viral, reaching 1.2 million views and an outpouring of support.

entry.title: Akşener’le esnaf arasında güldüren “Kahrolsun kapitalizm” diyaloğu: Herkese anlatacağım

link.title: Akşener’le esnaf arasında güldüren “Kahrolsun kapitalizm” diyaloğu: Herkese anlatacağım

entry.content: İYİ Parti lideri Meral Akşener’in esnafın dertlerini kamuoyuna duyurmak ve TBMM’ye taşımak amacıyla başlattığı yurt gezileri devam ediyor. Aksaray’ın Ortaköy ilçesinde esnaf ziyareti gerçekleştiren Akşener’in, 1998-2000 yılları arasında Ülkü Ocakları ikinci başkanı olduğunu söyleyen bir esnafla arasında geçen “Kahrolsun kapitalizm” diyaloğu kahkahalara sebep oldu. Akşener, “Bu konuşman çok hoşuma gitti. İsmini söyle ben herkese anlatacağım ifadelerini kullandı.
entry.summary: İYİ Parti lideri Meral Akşener’in esnafın dertlerini kamuoyuna duyurmak ve TBMM’ye taşımak amacıyla başlattığı yurt gezileri devam ediyor. Aksaray’ın Ortaköy ilçesinde esnaf ziyareti gerçekleştiren Akşener’in, 1998-2000 yılları arasında Ülkü Ocakları ikinci başkanı olduğunu söyleyen bir esnafla arasında geçen “Kahrolsun kapitalizm” diyaloğu kahkahalara sebep oldu. Akşener, “Bu konuşman çok hoşuma gitti. İsmini söyle ben herkese anlatacağım ifadelerini kullandı.

entry.title: Unidentified Inside America’s UFO Investigation - S02E08 - Extraterrestrial Encounters?

link.title: Unidentified Inside America’s UFO Investigation - S02E08 - Extraterrestrial Encounters?

entry.content:
Contact your representatives and SUPPORT S4049:
For more info visit:
For UFO discussion, visit the #1 UFO sub-reddit here:
When Lue Elizondo was part of the Pentagon’s Advanced Aerospace Threat Identification Program (AATIP) he identified five observable characteristics of UFOS, dubbed the "five observables." But there is a so-called sixth observable Elizondo began to investigate–an invisible threat these craft may pose. On the trail of this phenomenon, he uncovers never- before-told accounts by U.S. Air Force personnel stationed at the USA’s most sensitive sites.
entry.summary: Contact your representatives and SUPPORT S4049: For more info visit: For UFO discussion, visit the #1 UFO sub-reddit here: When Lue Elizondo was part of the Pentagon’s Advanced Aerospace Threat Identification Program (AATIP) he identified five observable characteristics of UFOS, dubbed the "five observables." But there is a so-called sixth observable Elizondo began to investigate–an invisible threat these craft may pose. On the trail of this phenomenon, he uncovers never- before-told accounts by U.S. Air Force personnel stationed at the USA’s most sensitive sites.

entry.title: ಅಂದು Bangalore ಇಂದು Raichur Oneindia Kannada

link.title: ಅಂದು Bangalore ಇಂದು Raichur Oneindia Kannada

entry.content:
A Facebook Post allegedly posted by a non hindu youth defaming Lord Sri Ram disturbs Devadurga town. Police controlling the situation.
#Bangalore #Raichur #FacebookPost
ಬೆಂಗಳೂರಿನ ದೇವರ ಜೀವನಹಳ್ಳಿ ಹಾಗೂ ಕಾಡುಗೊಂಡನಹಳ್ಳಿ ಗಲಭೆಯಿಂದ ಸುಧಾರಿಸಿಕೊಳ್ಳುವಷ್ಟರಲ್ಲೇ ರಾಯಚೂರು ಜಿಲ್ಲೆಯಲ್ಲಿ ಇಂಥದ್ದೇ ಘಟನೆಯೊಂದು ನಡೆದಿದೆ. ಫೇಸ್ಬುಕ್ ಪೋಸ್ಟ್ ಬಗ್ಗೆ ಆಕ್ಷೇಪ ವ್ಯಕ್ತಪಡಿಸಿ ನೂರಾರು ಮಂದಿ ಪೊಲೀಸ್ ಠಾಣೆಯ ಬಳಿ ಜಮಾಯಿಸಿದ್ದಾರೆ. ದೇವದುರ್ಗ ಪಟ್ಟಣದಲ್ಲಿ ಉದ್ವಿಗ್ನ ಪರಿಸ್ಥಿತಿ ಉಂಟಾಗಿದೆ.
entry.summary: A Facebook Post allegedly posted by a non hindu youth defaming Lord Sri Ram disturbs Devadurga town. Police controlling the situation. #Bangalore #Raichur #FacebookPost ಬೆಂಗಳೂರಿನ ದೇವರ ಜೀವನಹಳ್ಳಿ ಹಾಗೂ ಕಾಡುಗೊಂಡನಹಳ್ಳಿ ಗಲಭೆಯಿಂದ ಸುಧಾರಿಸಿಕೊಳ್ಳುವಷ್ಟರಲ್ಲೇ ರಾಯಚೂರು ಜಿಲ್ಲೆಯಲ್ಲಿ ಇಂಥದ್ದೇ ಘಟನೆಯೊಂದು ನಡೆದಿದೆ. ಫೇಸ್ಬುಕ್ ಪೋಸ್ಟ್ ಬಗ್ಗೆ ಆಕ್ಷೇಪ ವ್ಯಕ್ತಪಡಿಸಿ ನೂರಾರು ಮಂದಿ ಪೊಲೀಸ್ ಠಾಣೆಯ ಬಳಿ ಜಮಾಯಿಸಿದ್ದಾರೆ. ದೇವದುರ್ಗ ಪಟ್ಟಣದಲ್ಲಿ ಉದ್ವಿಗ್ನ ಪರಿಸ್ಥಿತಿ ಉಂಟಾಗಿದೆ.

entry.title: Skutik Vespa Baru Bikin Heboh Warga Sekampung

link.title: Skutik Vespa Baru Bikin Heboh Warga Sekampung

entry.content:
VIVA – Seorang perempuan yang membeli vespa baru mendapat sambutan heboh dari warga sekampung. Momen itu terekam dalam video yang diunggah akun Instagram @agoez_bandz4.
Kegiatan ini disebut Udik-udikkan, yaitu tradisi mengucap syukur pada Tuhan karena telah diberi rezeki untuk membeli sesuatu.
Dalam video, tampak warga melakukan tradisi itu saat sepeda motor Vespa LX kuning tiba di area kampungnya. Dalam tradisi, pemilik akan menebar beras dan uang logam untuk diperebutkan oleh warga yang datang.
Video itu membuat warganet kagum, karena saat ini, ketika membeli barang baru malah jadi bahan gunjingan tetangga.
Namun, hingga video ini tayang, masih belum diketahui pasti lokasi kejadian unik ini.
entry.summary: VIVA – Seorang perempuan yang membeli vespa baru mendapat sambutan heboh dari warga sekampung. Momen itu terekam dalam video yang diunggah akun Instagram @agoez_bandz4. Kegiatan ini disebut Udik-udikkan, yaitu tradisi mengucap syukur pada Tuhan karena telah diberi rezeki untuk membeli sesuatu. Dalam video, tampak warga melakukan tradisi itu saat sepeda motor Vespa LX kuning tiba di area kampungnya. Dalam tradisi, pemilik akan menebar beras dan uang logam untuk diperebutkan oleh warga yang datang. Video itu membuat warganet kagum, karena saat ini, ketika membeli barang baru malah jadi bahan gunjingan tetangga. Namun, hingga video ini tayang, masih belum diketahui pasti lokasi kejadian unik ini.

entry.title: Benefits Of Vitamin E

link.title: Benefits Of Vitamin E

entry.content:
Business Insider complied all the ways Vitamin E is good for you.
Vitamin E may slow the aging process of cells.
Vitamin E can help those with macular dysfunction.
Vitamin E boosts immune system response.
Vitamin E may slow memory loss in individuals with Alzheimer’s disease.
Vitamin E may improve blood vessel health.
Vitamin E may prevent sunburn and UV damage.
entry.summary: Business Insider complied all the ways Vitamin E is good for you. Vitamin E may slow the aging process of cells. Vitamin E can help those with macular dysfunction. Vitamin E boosts immune system response. Vitamin E may slow memory loss in individuals with Alzheimer’s disease. Vitamin E may improve blood vessel health. Vitamin E may prevent sunburn and UV damage.

entry.title: BSF shoots down 5 intruders at the India-Pakistan border in Punjab’s Tarn Taran Oneindia News

link.title: BSF shoots down 5 intruders at the India-Pakistan border in Punjab’s Tarn Taran Oneindia News

entry.content: The Border Security Force shot down five intruders, who were trying to cross over the Indian territory from Pakistan a village in Punjab’s Tarn Taran district. A suspected operative of the Islamic State was arrested by Delhi Police after a shoot out in Dhaula Kuan area late on Friday. The Railway Ministry has said that India has cancelled a tender for making 44 semi-high speed Vande Bharat trains. A staff member of Bollywood actor Sushant Singh Rajput was questioned for the second consecutive day by the CBI which began its investigation in the death case on Friday, hours after a special 10-member team arrived in Mumbai. No sings of the pandemic coming to an end as India registered the biggest single day jump in the Covid-19 cases in the 24 hours. With new facts emerging about the virus everyday, some hope emerges as the World Health Organisation has said that the Coronavirus Pandemic will be over sooner than the deadly Spanish Flu in the 1918.
entry.summary: The Border Security Force shot down five intruders, who were trying to cross over the Indian territory from Pakistan a village in Punjab’s Tarn Taran district. A suspected operative of the Islamic State was arrested by Delhi Police after a shoot out in Dhaula Kuan area late on Friday. The Railway Ministry has said that India has cancelled a tender for making 44 semi-high speed Vande Bharat trains. A staff member of Bollywood actor Sushant Singh Rajput was questioned for the second consecutive day by the CBI which began its investigation in the death case on Friday, hours after a special 10-member team arrived in Mumbai. No sings of the pandemic coming to an end as India registered the biggest single day jump in the Covid-19 cases in the 24 hours. With new facts emerging about the virus everyday, some hope emerges as the World Health Organisation has said that the Coronavirus Pandemic will be over sooner than the deadly Spanish Flu in the 1918.
